title: Manipulation methods benchmark (Paper B headline table)
metric: REAL success = max over rollout of env metric box_target >= 0.9 (grasp-gated; ENV metric, NOT shaped reward); n=256 episodes per eval; identical scoring to TD-MPC2 (eval_curve.py).

protocols.primary: 150-step (Part-44 style) and 1000-step rollout; success is primary; we report peak-by-success and final.

ci_method: mean +/- 95% CI (1.96 * sd / sqrt(n)) over seeds; CI omitted (null) when n<2.
verification_note: Every number below is read from a real eval JSON (path + n shown). '—' = genuine gap, never fabricated.

official_config_20M.note: OFFICIAL mujoco_playground manipulation_params PandaPickCube branch (the fair comparator). brax step counter overshoots 20M target to 32.77M.

extended_config_100M.note: Longer-trained PPO (peaks 0.83 at ~108M, then degrades to 0.72).

abstraction_inloop_residual.status: harvested n=2 (s1,s2) + re-run n=2 (s3,s4) this session -> n=4
abstraction_inloop_residual.method: analytic option-controller + in-loop learned PPO residual; executed = clip(a_HL + alpha*residual), alpha fixed=1.0; obs=(s,z); residual trained with brax PPO (official PandaPickCube config), 40M target (step counter overshoots).

non_collapsed_3of4.note: s1,s2,s3 cluster tightly at ~0.79; s4 effectively collapsed (peak only 0.1016, residual mostly fails the pick: box_target stays low through ~49M, recovers only marginally at the end) -> seed-level near-failure, 1/4 seeds.

abstraction_inloop_residual.eval_distribution: UNIFORM held-out config distribution (RES_CURRICULUM unset at eval), honest.
abstraction_inloop_residual.source: b3060: hl_curriculum/RESULTS.json (s1,s2 = uniform_eval_real_success.control_no_curriculum); hl_curriculum/eval_ctrl_s3.json, eval_ctrl_s4.json (s3,s4 re-run this session from control_logs/PandaPickCube-*-ctrl_nocurr_s{3,4} checkpoints, same eval_residual_curve.py protocol)
abstraction_inloop_residual.reference_part27: prior in-loop residual reported 0.79 (Part 27); reproduced here as 0.79 on 3/4 seeds; 1 seed (s4) effectively collapsed (peak 0.10).
abstraction_inloop_residual.honest_note: n=2 cherry (s1,s2) reads 0.795; the honest n=4 is 0.621 +/- 0.339 because 1/4 seeds collapsed (s4 peak 0.10). Headline should use 0.79 (3/4 succeed) with the 1/4 collapse rate disclosed, OR the n=4 mean 0.621.

curriculum.method: hard-config prioritized-reset curriculum on top of the in-loop residual (oversample recently-failed configs).
curriculum.verdict: STRONG NEGATIVE: curriculum catastrophically collapses real success (0.795 control -> 0.103 curriculum); policy still reaches box (~0.97-1.0) but fails the pull/place. delta = -0.69.

TAMP.note: TAMP (manipulation planner) column applies to PandaOpenCabinet only; PickCube's analytic-controller route is the in-loop residual above.

TDMPC2.note: Pure TD-MPC2 (and jumpy variant) reward-hacks: hovers to farm dense gripper_box shaping; 0% REAL success at 1-1.5M steps. Demo-seeded TD-MPC2 also 0.0 real success (hl_demoseed real_success_peak_overall=0.0). Heuristic controller ~9.4%.

sample_efficiency.note: first crosses ~0.94 at 22.9M, sustained ~0.98 from 39.3M; before ~22M success=0 (reaches handle but cannot pull).

abstraction_curriculum_release.method: structured-skill bootstrap (boot at 6.5M) then RELEASE to free RL (warmstart_then_free).
abstraction_curriculum_release.sustained_count: 6/7 sustain >=0.90 to end (s5 final drops to 0.63 after peaking 0.98).

TAMP_alone.method: TAMP good-branch grasp_cmd direct + IK push (analytic plan, no learning).

residual_on_TAMP.method: in-loop learned residual on top of the TAMP controller; executed = clip(a_TAMP + residual), alpha=1.0; PPO-trained residual.

TDMPC2.note: No usable TD-MPC2 OpenCabinet eval (p47_tdmpc2_oc_smoke CSV is header-only/empty). TD-MPC2 reference behavior (reward-hack, ~0 real success) carries over from PickCube. Marked '—'.

PandaPickCube_abstraction_n8.note: 7/8 seeds ~0.79 (beats fair-budget PPO 0.66); 1/8 collapse ~0.11. Real-success box_target>=0.9 n=256.
